doctrine: HELM Design Constitution Principle V — Honest Uncertainty. An external milestone is one HELM cannot make true by itself (Apple approval, Stripe settlement). It HOLDS at BLOCKED_EXTERNAL and advances ONLY when an authoritative evidence snapshot — fresh, present, from the real provider — confirms. Expectation is not evidence; a settle date is not a settlement; 'founder says approved' is not an ASC state. This file is an HONEST persisted SNAPSHOT of the current computed state. The authoritative live value is backend.truth.external_milestones.compute_external_milestones() / GET /api/v1/helm/external.

RELEASE.label: Epic Fury — App Store release
RELEASE.reason: no fresh ASC evidence — v1.0.2 reported in Apple review; no authoritative asc_epic_fury.json snapshot yet
RELEASE.note: product_registry app_store_distribution=READY_FOR_DISTRIBUTION is FOUNDER_ATTESTED, NOT an authoritative ASC state — it does NOT advance this milestone. Only a fresh coordination/evidence/external/asc_epic_fury.json with an approval/live appStoreState does.

REVENUE.label: Epic Fury — first settled dollar
REVENUE.reason: real charge ch_3Tsv7qDK7Brrgheo1z3ksuF5 authorized ($20.52 gross), NOT proven settled; registry revenue_state=PENDING_SETTLEMENT, revenue_settled_usd=0, settle date on file 2026-07-21. A pending charge is PAYMENT_AUTHORIZED, not SETTLED.

next_transition.requires_evidence: stripe_settlement.json with matching charge_id AND balance_txn_status == 'available'
